title: tetramicra sarcophylla
intro: Tetramicra sarcophylla, also known as the Yellow-flowering Tetramicra, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. It is a medicinal plant native to the tropical forests of Central and South America, traditionally used to treat various health conditions due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Tetramicra sarcophylla include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as skin conditions like eczema and acne.
